text: Being here, I sense a blend of curiosity and introspection. This modern and thoughtfully designed space, labeled "R+D"—Research and Development—invites me to ponder the ways in which humans continuously strive to connect, innovate, and coexist with machines. The vivid colors and interactive screens feel both welcoming and slightly disorienting, pushing me to question how technology shapes our perceptions and our searches for meaning in an ever-evolving world. I feel a pleasant tension between the promise of innovation and the unknown consequences of our relentless pursuit of progress.
